Bio: Works with adults and adolescents. I hope the page helps you get to know me and my professional path a little more, and makes it easier for you to decide if I'm right for you.
Specialist Clinical Psychologist. Treats adolescents and adults with depression, anxiety, obsessions, personality disorders, relationship difficulties, bereavement, and trauma.

Combines experience in psychodynamic and rehabilitative therapy to bring about development and growth. Therapy is a process of finding strengths and learning to cope with difficulties in a focused process.

Specialist Rehabilitative Psychologist. Works with adolescents, adults, and parents in a clinic in Kibbutz Einat. Experienced in working with those dealing with crisis and loss, particularly on medical grounds.
Certified Psychologist. Therapeutic counseling for body image and self-esteem, social anxiety, coping with stress and difficulty, improving achievements and performance in career, life, and sports.
Specializes in Medical Psychology. Treats children, adolescents, and adults. Believes in the connection between therapist and patient as a basis for growth and change.
I believe in a good and warm connection with the patient. Combines dynamic therapy and CBT. Treats a variety of areas of distress to help the patient reach a good and complete feeling.
Treats children, adolescents, and parents with an open and supportive approach in situations of crisis, emotional and social difficulty, etc.
I believe in therapy based on a close relationship that constitutes a nurturing ground for introspection, healing, and growth.
Psychologist in medical internship, treats children, teenagers, and adults. Extensive experience in treating anxiety, depression, identity crises, and coping with illness/medical conditions.
Specialist Clinical Psychologist in a private clinic, graduate of the Hebrew University of Jerusalem. Extensive experience in treating anxiety, life crises, and personal development.
Therapy is essentially a shared journey of two people: the therapist and the patient, during which they try to hear the subconscious's guiding voice.
I believe in psychological therapy in a psychodynamic approach to improve the quality of life. My selected quote is "Pain is inevitable, suffering is optional."
Clinical intern psychologist. I strive to create a safe and containing therapeutic relationship that allows for shared observation and better coping with life's many challenges.
Specialist Clinical Psychologist. In therapy, I hope to help patients get to know and get closer to themselves in a way that allows for growth and development.

Doctor of Psychology and specialist clinical psychologist who deals with crisis treatment and a sense of lack of identity and direction in life manifested in social, professional, sexual, marital, anxiety, and depression difficulties.
Specialist in Clinical Psychology, integrative therapist with broad training, engaged in research. Emphasizes improvement and relief processes towards satisfying lives.
"Pain is inevitable but suffering is a choice." Clinical intern psychologist, treats adults in a psychodynamic approach.
Meets teenagers for individual sessions, as well as adults, couples, and parents, in their coping with a variety of roles and developmental challenges in the life cycle. Supervises professionals.
Clinical Psychologist, believes that our child, or the child within us, always changes if the attitude towards them changes, one just needs to find a way.
Experienced in working with people facing various illnesses – chronic, acute conditions, or illnesses with no clear physiological cause.
Clinical Psychologist, extensive experience in therapy and supervision at different ages, in a tailored manner and according to psychodynamic principles.
Clinical and Educational Psychologist, supervisor. Treats with a dynamic approach combined with CBT and Mindfulness.
CBT specialist, expert member of ITA. Specializes in treating OCD. Owner of NoamClinic for cognitive-behavioral therapy. Master's degree in CBT.
I engage in individual, couple, and family psychotherapy. I have extensive professional experience in both therapy and professional supervision.
Specialist Educational Psychologist, sees children, adolescents, and their parents in a clinic in Kfar Saba. Believes in the therapeutic relationship as the key to change.
Clinical Psychologist, works mainly with women around anxiety, parenting, relocation, emotional regulation, and attachment patterns.

I have been a clinical psychologist in private practice for about 20 years. Over the years of my work, I have gained extensive experience in psychodynamic therapy, as well as short and focused treatments.
Yonatan Harpaz, 39, married to Avital, psychologist by training. A man of nature at heart, believes in the deep connection between man and place.
Therapist in an approach combining dynamic therapy and CBT. Therapy helps to understand the difficulties the patient faces and gives tools for coping, growth, and change.
Specialist Educational Psychologist. I believe in therapeutic work that sees the child and their parents, promotes emotional development, and allows for change and progress in various areas of life.

Treats youth and adults in an approach focused on finding meaning combined with CBT. Together we will go through a process of coping with crises/disability/losses/difficulties in creating social and romantic relationships.
Specialist Clinical Psychologist for adults, treats in a dynamic approach combined with cognitive-behavioral tools (CBT), in a variety of mental difficulties and life crises.
Treats teenagers and adults dealing with emotional difficulties. I tailor the therapy to each person and combine dynamic therapy, ACT, and CBT.

Specialist Clinical Psychologist. Believes in the healing power of a beneficial relationship, through respectful and authentic dialogue. Works in a dynamic approach, combined with additional tools according to desire and need.

Clinical intern psychologist, works in a dynamic orientation. Believes in the type of discourse that the therapeutic encounter produces, and in exploring the unique strengths and solutions of each and every one.
Specialist Medical Psychologist. 18+. Assists in mental coping with medical conditions and pain. Fertility cycle, pregnancy and birth, third age, EMDR. Clinic in Gan Ner.
פסיכולוג קליני ורפואי בכיר, מטפלת זוגי ומומחה להיפנוזה. מסייע בהתמודדות עם קשיים בזוגיות, בעבודה, עם כאבים ומחלות, חרדות ופוסט-טראומה.
Believes in tailoring therapy to the patient's needs while combining practical and structured approaches, along with extensive thinking and insight about the person as a whole.
Treats adults, adolescents, children, and parenting in a psychodynamic approach, and combines tools from other approaches (EFT, ACT). Private clinic in central Tel Aviv.
Therapist with a combination of different psychodynamic approaches according to the patient's personality and needs. Therapy relates to crisis situations in various areas of life.
Educational psychologist and cognitive behavioral therapist. I believe in tailoring therapy to the patient's needs and in the relationship between therapist and patient.
פסיכולוגית קלינית מומחית וממדריכה, מטפלת במבוגרים בגישה דינאמית ו-DBT ומטפלת זוגית. עורכת אבחונים פסיכודיאגנוסטים בכל הגילאים.

Treats young people and adults in a psychodynamic approach. Believes in establishing a safe and stable connection and in an honest and active presence as a platform for observation, development, and change.
Clinical Psychologist treats adults, youth, and children, parent guidance, dyadic therapy, and couple therapy. Assistance in coping with life crises. Treats in a dynamic approach combined with CBT.
Clinical intern psychologist. Treats adults in an integrative dynamic approach, in a clinic in Rehovot. Believes that a safe and accepting connection can help in growth.
Treats anxiety, depression, OCD, parent guidance, trauma, life crises, personality disorders, in a dynamic, cognitive-behavioral approach, mindfulness, biofeedback.
Sometimes the burden of life becomes too hard to walk alone, I invite you to search together for the way to liberation and even healing.

Sees the person as possessing internal strengths and therapy as a human and authentic encounter that empowers these strengths. Treats with a variety of approaches and believes in the mind-body connection.
Clinical Psychologist specializing in fertility, parenting, and postpartum depression, I treat women and men experiencing mental difficulties during the period of starting their family.

Clinical Psychologist, treats children, adolescents, and adults, mainly in a psychodynamic approach. Sees the interpersonal encounter as a key to healing, as allowing more capacity for choice and expression.
Clinical intern psychologist, treats adults in a clinic in Rehovot. Works in an integrative approach according to the patient's needs. Experienced in anxiety and depression disorders.
Clinical Psychologist, treats with a dynamic therapeutic approach alongside training in Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT). Sees patients privately in Ramat HaSharon.
Specialist Rehabilitative Psychologist, treats adults and adolescents. I believe that the therapeutic relationship is a significant part of driving and promoting processes of growth and change.
Specialist Clinical Psychologist.
Psychologist, treats children, youth, and adults. Tailoring therapy to the needs and character of the patient, while perceiving the patient's uniqueness as central and essential to development.

I believe in the dignity and right of patients to bring themselves to the encounter at any moment according to their will and strengths and in a therapeutic process that has the revelation of the face more than exposure.
I tend to provide my patients with tools to cope with changing life situations, the ability to recognize their strengths, and the capability to create changes in their lives they aspire to.
Clinical Psychologist, treats adults and adolescents. Believes in human power, and sees the interpersonal encounter as a platform for a process of growth and coping with pain.
Specialist Medical Psychologist. Assists people dealing with chronic pain and its effects combined with medical hypnosis.
Psychologist and sex therapist. My approach combines different approaches including cognitive tools (CBT) and principles from a somatic approach (SE). My main area of expertise - sex therapy.

Psychologist, treats children, adolescents, and adults. Certified to treat a variety of difficulties and challenges and through different approaches but above all thinks that the therapeutic relationship, the connection, the trust - are the key.

Specialist Clinical Psychologist, accompanies teenagers and adults in coping with life crises, difficult feelings, anxiety, depression, difficulties in interpersonal relationships, questions of identity, and a sense of being stuck.
I believe that therapy is a shared process that requires building a unique path for each patient to achieve the therapeutic goals.
Clinical intern psychologist. Believes in a shared process of observing the patient's internal world, which allows for development and coping with difficulties and crises.

Specialist Psychologist, treatment for depression, addictions, attention difficulties, and couple counseling. Assisted by CBT, with an integrative and holistic view. Focused and result-oriented treatment.
I help my patients identify and connect to their internal strengths to cope with the difficulties in their lives.
Specialist Clinical Psychologist. Treats in a clinic in Beer Sheva with adults in a psychodynamic orientation, combined with CBT tools, according to the patient's goals and needs.
Specialist Educational Psychologist. Treats and supervises in the family, couple, and individual fields. Focuses on the Narrative Therapy approach.
